---
title: "Life, lately"
description: >
    Thoughts, notes, and small discoveries from a Ph.D. student exploring fungi, genomes, research, and everything in between
listing:
  contents:
    - "**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, image, description, categories]
  feed:
    categories: [R]
  image-align: right
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
